title: Hearty Mung Bean Stew
description: A comforting and nutritious stew made with mung beans and Norwegian mellow flavor, perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: mellow
ingredients.notes: Norwegian mellow, such as mellow mustard

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite vegetables such as carrots, potatoes, and onions

instructions: Heat the mellow in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the crushed krumkaker and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the mung beans, stew, water, salt, and black pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the mung beans are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
